title: Manner of sale of notes
doc_html:
§1410.47.  Manner of sale of notes

Notes may be sold at public sale on a competitive bid basis or at negotiated sale and may be sold at such price as determined by the commission.

Acts 1991, No. 827, §1.
doc_text:
§1410.47.  Manner of sale of notes
Notes may be sold at public sale on a competitive bid basis or at negotiated sale and may be sold at such price as determined by the commission.
Acts 1991, No. 827, §1.
